headline: AI for Fleet Management: Predictive Maintenance, Route Optimization, and Telematics
description: AI fleet management transforms trucks into intelligent assets -- predicting breakdowns before they happen, optimizing routes in real-time, and scoring driver safety. From Samsara's 40,000+ fleets to UPS saving millions on fuel, AI makes transportation safer, cheaper, and greener.

citation.name: AI and Machine Learning for Fleet Management: Predictive Maintenance, Route Optimization, and Driver Safety (2024-2025 Comprehensive Survey)
Deep Learning for Vehicle Telematics: Driver Behavior Analysis, Fuel Efficiency, and Predictive Maintenance
